_template.name: FluxNova: KYC Onboarding
_template.description: Pre-trade KYC onboarding architecture with identity verification, sanctions screening, risk scoring, and compliance review built on FluxNova BPM platform
_template.author: CalmStudio Contributors

nodes.name: FluxNova Platform
nodes.description: Full FluxNova BPM platform deployment hosting the KYC onboarding process

nodes.name: FluxNova BPM Engine
nodes.description: Core BPMN 2.0 / DMN 1.3 engine executing the Client Onboarding KYC process (Process_ClientOnboardingKYC) with boundary timers, escalation gateways, and DMN risk scoring

audit-logging.description: All process execution events, variable changes, task assignments, and decision outcomes are recorded in an immutable audit log for regulatory compliance

nodes.name: FluxNova REST API
nodes.description: RESTful API layer providing endpoints for KYC process deployment, task management, and external task worker integration

nodes.name: FluxNova Cockpit
nodes.description: Process monitoring dashboard for KYC onboarding — tracks in-flight applications, SLA breaches, and escalation incidents

nodes.name: FluxNova Admin
nodes.description: Management console for KYC user roles, group assignments, and authorization policies

nodes.name: FluxNova Tasklist
nodes.description: Task UI for compliance officers and operations staff to claim and complete KYC review tasks, remediation tasks, and enhanced due diligence assessments

nodes.name: Process Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing KYC process definitions, runtime state, decision audit history, and escalation records

nodes.name: Customer
nodes.description: Prospective client submitting a KYC onboarding application, providing identity documents, proof of address, and corporate documentation

nodes.name: Compliance Officer
nodes.description: Reviews medium-risk KYC applications, conducts compliance investigations on sanctions matches, and makes approval/rejection decisions

nodes.name: Senior Compliance Officer
nodes.description: Conducts enhanced due diligence for high-risk KYC applications and handles escalated compliance decisions

nodes.name: Operations Manager
nodes.description: Receives escalations when document verification SLA (48 hours) is breached and manages operational remediation

nodes.name: Identity Verification Service
nodes.description: External task worker performing OCR, biometric verification, and identity document validation via third-party IDV provider (topic: doc-verification)

data-classification.description: Processes personally identifiable information including identity documents, biometric data, and government IDs — classified as PII

audit-logging.description: All verification requests, results, and third-party API calls are logged for regulatory audit trail

nodes.name: Sanctions & PEP Screening Service
nodes.description: External task worker querying OFAC, UN, EU sanctions lists and PEP databases for compliance checks (topic: sanctions-screen)

audit-logging.description: All sanctions and PEP screening queries, match results, and investigation outcomes are logged for regulatory compliance

nodes.name: AML/KYC Risk Scoring Service
nodes.description: DMN decision table evaluating client type, jurisdiction, transaction profile, PEP status, sanctions results, and beneficial ownership to produce a risk category (Low/Medium/High)

audit-logging.description: All risk scoring inputs, decision table evaluations, and output categories are logged with full decision rationale

nodes.name: Document Management Service
nodes.description: External task worker handling secure storage and retrieval of identity documents, proof of address, and corporate documentation (topic: document-management)

data-classification.description: Stores and manages personally identifiable documents including passports, driving licenses, and proof of address — classified as PII

encryption-at-rest.description: All stored documents are encrypted at rest using AES-256 to protect PII

nodes.name: Notification Service
nodes.description: External task worker sending email and push notifications to customers, sales teams, and compliance staff for onboarding status updates (topic: notifications)

nodes.name: CRM Sync Service
nodes.description: External task worker persisting client data to the CRM and provisioning accounts in trading and custodian systems upon approval (topic: crm-sync, account-provisioning)

nodes.name: KYC Database
nodes.description: Dedicated database storing customer PII, verification results, sanctions screening outcomes, risk assessments, and compliance decisions

data-classification.description: Contains personally identifiable information including customer identity data, verification results, and compliance decisions — classified as PII

encryption-at-rest.description: All PII data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 with key management via HSM

access-control.description: Database access restricted to authorized KYC services only via role-based access control and network segmentation

nodes.name: Watchlist Data Provider
nodes.description: External system providing OFAC, UN, EU sanctions lists and PEP databases for compliance screening

nodes.name: Identity Verification Provider
nodes.description: External third-party identity verification provider performing OCR, biometric matching, and document authenticity checks

relationships.description: Engine persists KYC process state, history, decision audit data, and escalation records

encryption-in-transit.description: Database connection uses TLS-encrypted JDBC to protect process data and credentials in transit

relationships.description: REST API delegates all requests to the embedded engine via internal Java API calls
Cockpit queries KYC process instances, SLA breach incidents, and escalation status
Admin manages KYC user roles, compliance group assignments, and authorization policies
Tasklist enables compliance officers and ops staff to claim and complete KYC review tasks
Customer submits onboarding application and uploads identity documents via the client portal
Compliance officer claims and completes medium-risk review tasks, sanctions investigation tasks, and approval decisions
Senior compliance officer conducts enhanced due diligence tasks for high-risk applications
Operations manager monitors SLA compliance and receives escalation alerts for document verification delays
Engine dispatches document verification external tasks (ServiceTask_VerifyDocuments) with 48-hour SLA boundary timer

audit-logging.description: All verification task dispatches, completions, and SLA breach escalations are audit-logged

relationships.description: Engine dispatches sanctions and PEP screening external tasks (ServiceTask_SanctionsPEP) after document verification passes

audit-logging.description: All screening task dispatches, match results, and routing decisions are audit-logged

relationships.description: Engine invokes DMN risk assessment (BusinessRule_RiskAssessment) with 24-hour SLA boundary timer, producing Low/Medium/High risk category

audit-logging.description: All risk scoring inputs, DMN decision table evaluations, and category outputs are audit-logged with full rationale

relationships.description: Engine dispatches document storage tasks (ServiceTask_StoreDocuments) for uploaded identity documents and corporate documentation

encryption-in-transit.description: PII document transfers use TLS 1.3 encryption in transit

relationships.description: Engine dispatches notification tasks (ServiceTask_NotifySalesClient) for onboarding status updates and approval/rejection notices
Engine dispatches CRM sync tasks (ServiceTask_PersistClientData) and account provisioning tasks (ServiceTask_AccountOpening) for approved clients

audit-logging.description: All client data persistence and account provisioning events are audit-logged

relationships.description: Persists identity verification results, document metadata, and biometric match scores

encryption-in-transit.description: PII data transfers to database use TLS-encrypted JDBC

relationships.description: Persists sanctions screening results, PEP match data, and investigation outcomes

encryption-in-transit.description: Screening result transfers to database use TLS-encrypted JDBC

relationships.description: Persists risk assessment inputs, DMN decision outputs, and risk category assignments
Persists document metadata, storage references, and verification linkages

encryption-in-transit.description: PII document metadata transfers to database use TLS-encrypted JDBC

relationships.description: Reads approved client data for CRM synchronization and account provisioning
Calls external IDV provider API for OCR, biometric matching, and document authenticity verification

encryption-in-transit.description: External API calls carrying PII use mTLS for mutual authentication and encryption

audit-logging.description: All external IDV API calls and responses are logged for compliance audit trail

relationships.description: Queries OFAC, UN, EU sanctions lists and PEP databases for compliance screening

encryption-in-transit.description: External watchlist API calls use TLS 1.3 encryption for data protection

audit-logging.description: All sanctions screening queries and results are logged for regulatory compliance

relationships.description: FluxNova platform contains the BPM engine
FluxNova platform contains the REST API
FluxNova platform contains the Cockpit monitoring app
FluxNova platform contains the Admin management app
FluxNova platform contains the Tasklist app
FluxNova platform contains the process database
